issues.title: Enemy dealt 36 dmg (59% of 61 HP) on floor 3
issues.description: On floor 3, encounter 2, turn 18 (seq 343), the enemy dealt 36 damage which is 59% of the player's 61 HP before the hit. This exceeds the 50% threshold for a single enemy turn.
issues.suggestedFix: Cap single-hit enemy damage to 50% of player current HP or add damage-reduction mechanics.

issues.title: Enemy dealt 39 dmg (91% of 43 HP) on floor 3
issues.description: On floor 3, encounter 2, turn 19 (seq 347), the enemy dealt 39 damage which is 91% of the player's 43 HP before the hit. This exceeds the 50% threshold for a single enemy turn.
issues.suggestedFix: Cap single-hit enemy damage to 50% of player current HP or add damage-reduction mechanics.

issues.title: Enemy dealt 31 dmg (100% of 31 HP) on floor 3
issues.description: On floor 3, encounter 2, turn 20 (seq 351), the enemy dealt 31 damage which is 100% of the player's 31 HP before the hit. This exceeds the 50% threshold for a single enemy turn.
issues.suggestedFix: Cap single-hit enemy damage to 50% of player current HP or add damage-reduction mechanics.

issues.title: 6 consecutive easy encounters (floors 1-3)
issues.description: 6 consecutive encounters where player ended with >90 HP remaining. Encounters: F1E2:93HP, F2E0:96HP, F2E1:100HP, F2E2:100HP, F3E0:97HP, F3E1:100HP. The game may not be challenging enough in this stretch.
issues.suggestedFix: Consider scaling enemy HP or damage for this difficulty/profile combination.

issues.title: Player defeated on floor 3, encounter 2 (the_curator)
issues.description: Player was defeated on floor 3, encounter 2 against the_curator (boss). Accuracy was 77% with 20 turns played. Early defeat suggests difficulty may be too high for this profile.
issues.suggestedFix: Reduce early floor enemy HP/damage or activate canary system earlier for struggling profiles.

issues.title: Floor 2 enc 0: 13 turns vs prev floor avg 3.3
issues.description: Encounter 0 on floor 2 took 13 turns to resolve, which is more than 2x the previous floor's average of 3.3 turns. This indicates a sharp difficulty spike. Enemy: crystal_golem (common).

issues.title: Floor 2 enc 1: 11 turns vs prev floor avg 3.3
issues.description: Encounter 1 on floor 2 took 11 turns to resolve, which is more than 2x the previous floor's average of 3.3 turns. This indicates a sharp difficulty spike. Enemy: crystal_golem (common).

issues.title: Floor 2 enc 2: 12 turns vs prev floor avg 3.3
issues.description: Encounter 2 on floor 2 took 12 turns to resolve, which is more than 2x the previous floor's average of 3.3 turns. This indicates a sharp difficulty spike. Enemy: stone_sentinel (mini_boss).

issues.title: HP crashed from 100 to 4 in floor 3 encounter 2
issues.description: During floor 3, encounter 2, player HP dropped from 100 to 4. Going from >70 to <20 in one encounter feels punishing and unfun.

issues.title: Card type "wild" was never played during the entire run
issues.description: The card type "wild" had 0 plays across the entire run (249 total cards played). This may indicate the type is not appearing in decks, not being offered, or players are avoiding it.
reproductionSteps: Check deck composition — does "wild" appear in the card pool?
